steps.name: updateStaple domain + port + adapter
steps.criteria: StapleLibrary.updateStaple(id, changes) changes houseArea and/or storeLocation. Validates no duplicate (self-exclusion by ID). StapleStorage.update(item) replaces item by ID. All 4 walking skeleton tests pass.
steps.scenario_name: moves a staple to a different house area

steps.name: Edit validation and remove
steps.criteria: Rejects empty houseArea, empty section, non-existent staple ID. Remove staple works (already exists). Cancel preserves original.
steps.scenario_name: rejects edit with empty house area

steps.name: Trip sync on staple edit
steps.criteria: When staple area or section changes, matching trip item updates. One-off items unaffected.
steps.scenario_name: trip item moves to new area when staple area is edited

steps.name: Edit UI - MetadataBottomSheet edit mode
steps.criteria: Tapping staple in HomeView opens MetadataBottomSheet in edit mode with pre-filled values. Save Changes updates staple. Cancel dismisses without changes.
